CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, GEORRFEY GORDON-CREED, TO COUNSELS; RE: ARBITRATIOIN DATES ON WHICH YOU ARE AVAILABLE FOR THE ARBITRATION HEARING. WOULD LIKE TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD WITHIN THE NEXT 60 DAYS. AFTER YOU HAVE CONFERRED WITH EACH OTHER, PLEASE CONTACT MY SECRETARY, LINDA HALPERIN. IF I DO NOT HEAR FROM YOU WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS LETTER, I WILL SET A DATE.
